name: Lark (Larksuite)
description: A comprehensive enterprise collaboration suite integrating messaging, calendars, documents, video conferencing, and workflow automation into a single platform.
notes: Lark provides an extensive Open Platform with over 2500+ APIs, making it highly suitable for agent tooling integration via bots and webhooks. [human-verified: Both confirmed. Free developer account at open.larksuite.com. App creation instant.]
